text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky and I are going home after a day out
when we somehow get lost.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Umm, did I majorly mess up? I'm not sure how to
get back to a road I know!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe we ended up in this trouble just
because I tried to take a detour!
choice_data_list: Let's check the map on our phones!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Wait, Trainer! There's a better way to get out of a
situation like this!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Wait, Trainer! There's a better way to get out of a
situation like this!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: See, look over there. Let's ask the police officer.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Excuse me. Sorry to bother you, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After asking for directions at the police box, we
make it back to familiar ground.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Well, that settles that! I'm so glad I asked the
officer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I hear you can easily look up a map using your
phone, but it's better to ask someone, don't you
think?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It also lets me stay true to what my father taught
me!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
He said there's no shame in asking for help when
you need it.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
No matter how great you are, you can't do
everything by yourself.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
If you try to handle all your problems alone, you
might get stuck...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
So to avoid that, make it a point to connect with
others. That's what he told me.
choice_data_list: That's a good attitude to have.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Isn't it? It makes me happy to hear you say so.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's not just about relying on someone or having
them rely on you, it's about supporting each
other...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I hope we can have that kind of relationship too.
choice_data_list: I'll work hard to be as dependable as I can be.
I'll work hard to be as dependable as I can be.
You already support me so much.
You already support me so much.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I hope we can have that kind of relationship too.
choice_data_list: I'll work hard to be as dependable as I can be.
I'll work hard to be as dependable as I can be.
You already support me so much.
You already support me so much.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I already think you're a very dependable person,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I already think you're a very dependable person,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You always help me so much in my training and
the big races.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Above all, it's thanks to you that I'm able to run
so happily. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Above all, it's thanks to you that I'm able to run
so happily. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I have to admit—you're like a reliable big brother
to me!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I have to admit—you're like a reliable big sister to
me!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You can wear my seal of approval with pride! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel both pride and joy welling up in my heart at
Maruzensky's words.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm so glad! ♪ It's very encouraging to hear
you say so.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I always want to be there for you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I always want to be there for you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You're a hard worker, but sometimes you push yourself a little too hard.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You're a hard worker, but sometimes you push yourself a little too hard.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But everything will be fine as long as we're there
to support each other!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
So let's work together—not just as Umamusume
and trainer, but as a team! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Right! As partners! ♪ Now and forever!
